CVE-2025-11146.description: Reflected Cross-site scripting (XSS) in Apt-Cacher-NG v3.2.1. The vulnerability allows an attacker to execute malicious scripts (XSS) in the web management application. The vulnerability is caused by improper handling of GET inputs included in the URL in “/acng-report.html”.
